extensionName.description: Display name shown in chrome://extensions and the Web Store listing.

extensionDescription.message: Chromium-first operator console for Arguslog MCP with curated issue, release, workflow, and tool surfaces.
extensionDescription.description: Tagline shown next to the name; appears under 132 characters per Web Store policy.

errIssuesLoadFailed.description: Banner title above the issue list when listIssues rejects (typically 401/403 from an expired PAT).

errReleasesLoadFailed.description: Banner title above the releases list on transport / auth failure.

errToolsLoadFailed.description: Banner title on the Tools screen when the capability catalog query rejects.
